title: lupinus lyallii var. villosus
intro: Lupinus lyallii var. villosus, also known as Lyall's lupine, is a variety of the Lyall's lupine plant, a flowering plant native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lupinus lyallii var. villosus are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Lupinus lyallii var. villosus is traditionally prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
